policy: Public Playro releases expose only product-native Roblox build skills. Inherited Hermes skill packs are intentionally not shipped in this repository; contributors can add Playro-scoped skills under product/roblox_ai_studio after license review.

available_buckets.core: Native Playro skills required for prompt-to-Roblox project generation.
available_buckets.toolbox: Native Playro helper skills for validation, packaging, and Studio handoff.
available_buckets.conditional: Reserved for future Playro-scoped skills that are hidden until explicitly enabled.
